'''bangotho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vysotskite|vysotskite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-ng-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vysotskite|vysotskite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bangotho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bængetheth|bængetheth]] || [[word:bængethej|bængethej]] || [[word:bængethesh|bængethesh]] || [[word:bængethe|bængethe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bangongothoth|bangongothoth]] || [[word:bangongothoj|bangongothoj]] || [[word:bangongothosh|bangongothosh]] || [[word:bangongotho|bangongotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bangothoth|bangothoth]] || [[word:bangothoj|bangothoj]] || [[word:bangothosh|bangothosh]] || [[word:bangotho|bangotho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bangofthoth|bangofthoth]] || [[word:bangofthoj|bangofthoj]] || [[word:bangofthosh|bangofthosh]] || [[word:bangofthof|bangofthof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bangothotho|bangothotho]] || [[word:bangothojo|bangothojo]] || [[word:bangothosho|bangothosho]] || [[word:bangothoko|bangothoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bangothoth|bangothoth]] || [[word:bangothoj|bangothoj]] || [[word:bangothosh|bangothosh]] || [[word:bangotho|bangotho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bangothothol|bangothothol]] || [[word:bangothojol|bangothojol]] || [[word:bangothoshol|bangothoshol]] || [[word:bangothokol|bangothokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bangothothotho|bangothothotho]] || [[word:bangothojojo|bangothojojo]] || [[word:bangothoshosho|bangothoshosho]] || [[word:bangothoko|bangothoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bangothothon|bangothothon]] || [[word:bangothojon|bangothojon]] || [[word:bangothoshon|bangothoshon]] || [[word:bangothokon|bangothokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bangothothoro|bangothothoro]] || [[word:bangothojoro|bangothojoro]] || [[word:bangothoshoro|bangothoshoro]] || [[word:bangothokoro|bangothokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
